---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Derek Sleepfield"
description-meta: "A small library of not-academic writing by Derek Wakefield."
toc: false
page-layout: article
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
            #title-block-header { display: none; }
          </style>
---

::: {.shelf-landing}

<h1 class="shelf-title">The shelf.</h1>

<p class="shelf-lede">A small library of not-academic writing
by Derek Wakefield. Kept here quietly.</p>

<p class="shelf-para">Parables, codas, essays &mdash;
whatever else wants a home.</p>

<div class="shelf-ornament">&#x2756;&#x2756;&#x2756;</div>

<p class="shelf-small">New things appear when there is something to appear.
No newsletter. No schedule. Bake when you can.</p>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-lost-bookmark">
      ／¯\_／¯\＿___
     (  ‿     ‿       )
      \_____________／
   the bookmark cat — cream-and-tan ragdoll
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-porch-light">
       ／\_／\
      (  ◉   ◉ )
       )  ω  (
       │  │  │  │
   the porch cat — charcoal shorthair, paws on the screen door
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-wildflower">
        ⚘    ⚘
       ／\_／\
      (  ◔   ◕ )⚘
        \   ω   /
   the meadow cat — cream calico in tall grass
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-frozen-wood">
      ＝❄=/\＿/\=❄＝
     ／  (  ◉   ◉  )  \
    ／    )   ω   (    \
       ▔▔▔▔▔▔▔▔
   the frost cat — white Siberian, frost-tipped fur
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-highway-diner">
       ／\_／\
      (  ◎   ◎ )
       )  ⌣  (
       ▔▔▔▔▔▔
   the counter cat — pink-eared cream, two a.m. regular
</pre>

<pre class="resident-cat cat-crones-cottage">
        ✦
       ／\_／\
      (  ◉   ◉ )
       )  ω  (
       ▔▔▔▔▔
   the cottage cat — black-and-silver tortoiseshell, witch-familiar
</pre>

:::
